app/fix-keys.js:
app/fix-keys.js:function fixKeysInFile(filePath) {
app/fix-keys.js:  let content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8');
app/fix-keys.js:  let original = content;
app/fix-keys.js:
app/fix-keys.js:  // Fix att.id
app/fix-keys.js:  content = content.replace(/key=\{att\.id( \s*\|\|\s*[^}]+)?\}/g, (match) => {
app/fix-keys.js:    return 'key={att.id || att.url || Math.random().toString()}';
app/fix-keys.js:  });
app/fix-keys.js:
app/fix-keys.js:  // Fix attachment.id
app/fix-keys.js:  content = content.replace(/key=\{attachment\.id( \s*\|\|\s*[^}]+)?\}/g, (match) => {
app/fix-keys.js:    return 'key={attachment.id || attachment.url || Math.random().toString()}';
app/fix-keys.js:  });
app/fix-keys.js:
app/fix-keys.js:  // Fix file.id
app/fix-keys.js:  content = content.replace(/key=\{file\.id( \s*\|\|\s*[^}]+)?\}/g, (match) => {
app/fix-keys.js:    return 'key={file.id || file.url || Math.random().toString()}';
app/fix-keys.js:  });
app/fix-keys.js:
app/fix-keys.js:  // Fix msg.id (just in case)
app/fix-keys.js:  content = content.replace(/key=\{msg\.id( \s*\|\|\s*[^}]+)?\}/g, (match) => {
app/fix-keys.js:    return 'key={msg.id || Math.random().toString()}';
app/fix-keys.js:  });
app/fix-keys.js:  
app/fix-keys.js:  if (content !== original) {
app/fix-keys.js:    fs.writeFileSync(filePath, content);
app/fix-keys.js:    console.log(`Fixed keys in ${filePath}`);
app/fix-keys.js:  }
app/fix-keys.js:}

script.js:const fs = require('fs');
script.js:
script.js:const files = ['components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx', 'components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx'];
script.js:
script.js:files.forEach(file => {
script.js:    let content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf-8');
script.js:    
script.js:    // AnimatePresence fix
script.js:    content = content.replace(/<AnimatePresence mode="wait">/g, '<AnimatePresence>');
script.js:    
script.js:    // ResponsiveContainer fix
script.js:    content = content.replace(/<ResponsiveContainer\s+width="100%"\s+height="100%">/g, '<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>');
script.js:    content = content.replace(/<ResponsiveContainer\s+width="100%"\s+height={400}>/g, '<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>');
script.js:    
script.js:    // Replace index keys
script.js:    // Usually key={`prefix-${item.id}-${index}`} -> key={`prefix-${item.id}`}
script.js:    content = content.replace(/key=\{`([^`]+?)-\$\{(?:index|idx|i)\}`\}/g, (match, p1) => {
script.js:        // Only strip if p1 already contains an id or is decently unique
script.js:        if (p1.includes('.id') || p1.includes('.name') || p1.includes('grade') || p1.includes('subject')) {
script.js:            return `key={\`${p1}\`}`;
script.js:        }
script.js:        return match;
script.js:    });
script.js:
script.js:    // Special cases where the index is embedded differently
script.js:    content = content.replace(/key=\{`([^`]+?)-\$\{idx\}`\}/g, 'key={`$1`}');
script.js:    content = content.replace(/key=\{`([^`]+?)-\$\{index\}`\}/g, 'key={`$1`}');
script.js:    
script.js:    // If we removed it, it might have trailing dashes
script.js:    content = content.replace(/-\s*`/g, '`');
script.js:
script.js:    fs.writeFileSync(file, content, 'utf-8');
script.js:});
script.js:console.log("Done");

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:          } catch (error) {

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:  const handleAddLesson = async () => {

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:  const getFileIcon = (material: LessonMaterial) => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    const typeTag = material.tags?.find(tag => ['ppt', 'video', 'link', 'image', 'doc', 'audio', 'text'].includes(tag || ''));
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    const attachment = material.attachments[0];
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    const fileName = attachment?.name?.toLowerCase() || '';
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    const url = attachment?.url?.toLowerCase() || '';
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (typeTag === 'text') {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: FileText, color: 'text-slate-500', bg: 'bg-slate-100', label: 'نص' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (typeTag === 'ppt' || fileName.includes('powerpoint') || fileName.endsWith('.ppt') || fileName.endsWith('.pptx')) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: FileIcon, color: 'text-orange-500', bg: 'bg-orange-50', label: 'PPT' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (typeTag === 'video' || fileName.endsWith('.mp4') || fileName.endsWith('.mov') || fileName.endsWith('.avi')) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: Video, color: 'text-red-500', bg: 'bg-red-50', label: 'فيديو' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (typeTag === 'audio' || fileName.endsWith('.mp3') || fileName.endsWith('.wav')) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: Music, color: 'text-emerald-500', bg: 'bg-emerald-50', label: 'صوت' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (typeTag === 'image' || fileName.endsWith('.jpg') || fileName.endsWith('.jpeg') || fileName.endsWith('.png') || fileName.endsWith('.gif')) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: ImageIcon, color: 'text-purple-500', bg: 'bg-purple-50', label: 'صورة' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (typeTag === 'link' || attachment?.type === 'link') {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: LinkIcon, color: 'text-blue-500', bg: 'bg-blue-50', label: 'رابط' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.pdf')) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: FileText, color: 'text-red-600', bg: 'bg-red-50', label: 'PDF' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.doc') || fileName.endsWith('.docx')) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      return { icon: FileText, color: 'text-blue-600', bg: 'bg-blue-50', label: 'DOCX' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    return { icon: FileText, color: 'text-slate-400', bg: 'bg-slate-50', label: 'ملف' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:  };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:  const getAttachmentIcon = (attachment: Attachment) => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    const fileName = (attachment.name || '').toLowerCase();
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    const type = attachment.type;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (type === 'link') return { icon: LinkIcon, color: 'text-blue-500', bg: 'bg-blue-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.pdf')) return { icon: FileText, color: 'text-red-600', bg: 'bg-red-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.doc') || fileName.endsWith('.docx')) return { icon: FileText, color: 'text-blue-600', bg: 'bg-blue-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.ppt') || fileName.endsWith('.pptx')) return { icon: FileIcon, color: 'text-orange-500', bg: 'bg-orange-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.mp4') || fileName.endsWith('.mov') || fileName.endsWith('.avi')) return { icon: Video, color: 'text-red-500', bg: 'bg-red-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.mp3') || fileName.endsWith('.wav')) return { icon: Music, color: 'text-emerald-500', bg: 'bg-emerald-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    if (fileName.endsWith('.jpg') || fileName.endsWith('.jpeg') || fileName.endsWith('.png') || fileName.endsWith('.gif')) return { icon: ImageIcon, color: 'text-purple-500', bg: 'bg-purple-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:    return { icon: FileIcon, color: 'text-slate-400', bg: 'bg-slate-50' };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:  };

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:          return hasAllowedSubject || hasAllowedAssignment;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:        });
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:      }

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: progress }));

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        (error) => {

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          reject(error);

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                              delete next[file.name];

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      (snapshot) => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        const progress = (snapshot.bytesTransferred / snapshot.totalBytes) * 100;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: progress }));
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      },
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      (error) => reject(error),
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      async () => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        const downloadURL = await getDownloadURL(uploadTask.snapshot.ref);

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          id: `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          type: 'file' as const,
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          url: downloadURL,
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          name: file.name
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        }]);
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        setUploadProgress(prev => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          const next = { ...prev };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          delete next[file.name];
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                          return next;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        });
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        resolve();
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    );
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  });
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                } catch (error) {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  console.error("Error uploading post attachment:", error);
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                              }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                            }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                          }}

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      const progress = (snapshot.bytesTransferred / snapshot.totalBytes) * 100;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: progress }));

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                        delete next[file.name];

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      });
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      resolve();
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  );

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                              const uploadTask = uploadBytesResumable(storageRef, file);
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                              setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: 0 }));

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                uploadTask.on('state_changed',
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  (snapshot) => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    const progress = (snapshot.bytesTransferred / snapshot.totalBytes) * 100;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: progress }));
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  },
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  (error) => reject(error),
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  () => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    setUploadProgress(prev => {
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      const next = { ...prev };
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      delete next[file.name];
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                      return next;
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    });
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                    resolve(uploadTask.snapshot);
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                  }
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                                );
components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                              });

components/SupervisorDashboard.tsx:                          }

components/LoginForm.tsx:const LoginForm: React.FC<LoginFormProps> = ({ onLogin, teachers, onForgotPassword, onUpdateSupervisorConfig, supervisorConfig, currentYear, currentSemester }) => {

components/LoginForm.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState('');
components/LoginForm.tsx:  const [showForgotModal, setShowForgotModal] = useState(false);
components/LoginForm.tsx:  const [forgotId, setForgotId] = useState('');

components/LoginForm.tsx:    const cleanPass = password.trim();

components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                  const file = await compressImage(rawFile);
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                  const storageRef = ref(storage, `submissions/${Date.now()}_${file.name}`);

components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                    const uploadTask = uploadBytesResumable(storageRef, file);
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                    setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: 0 }));
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                    const snapshot = await new Promise<UploadTaskSnapshot>((resolve, reject) => {
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                      uploadTask.on('state_changed',
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                        (snapshot) => {
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                          const progress = (snapshot.bytesTransferred / snapshot.totalBytes) * 100;
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                          setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [file.name]: progress }));
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                        },
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                        (error) => reject(error),
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                        () => {
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                          setUploadProgress(prev => {
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                            const next = { ...prev };
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                            delete next[file.name];
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                            return next;
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                          });
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                          resolve(uploadTask.snapshot);
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                        }
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                      );
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                    });

components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                      const next = { ...prev };
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                      delete next[file.name];
components/TeacherDashboardV2.tsx:                                      return next;

src/services/exportService.ts:export const exportToCSV = (data: any[], filename: string) => {
src/services/exportService.ts:  if (data.length === 0) return;
src/services/exportService.ts:  
src/services/exportService.ts:  const headers = Object.keys(data[0]);
src/services/exportService.ts:  const csvContent = [
src/services/exportService.ts:    headers.join(','),
src/services/exportService.ts:    ...data.map(row => 
src/services/exportService.ts:      headers.map(fieldName => {
src/services/exportService.ts:        const value = row[fieldName] === null || row[fieldName] === undefined ? '' : row[fieldName];
src/services/exportService.ts:        // Escape quotes and handle commas
src/services/exportService.ts:        const escaped = ('' + value).replace(/"/g, '""');
src/services/exportService.ts:        return `"${escaped}"`;
src/services/exportService.ts:      }).join(',')
src/services/exportService.ts:    )
src/services/exportService.ts:  ].join('\n');
src/services/exportService.ts:
src/services/exportService.ts:  // Add BOM for Excel Arabic support
src/services/exportService.ts:  const blob = new Blob(['\ufeff' + csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
src/services/exportService.ts:  const link = document.createElement('a');
src/services/exportService.ts:  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
src/services/exportService.ts:  link.setAttribute('href', url);
src/services/exportService.ts:  link.setAttribute('download', `${filename}.csv`);
src/services/exportService.ts:  link.style.visibility = 'hidden';
src/services/exportService.ts:  document.body.appendChild(link);
src/services/exportService.ts:  link.click();
src/services/exportService.ts:  document.body.removeChild(link);
src/services/exportService.ts:};

src/services/exportService.ts:  const element = document.getElementById(elementId);
src/services/exportService.ts:  if (!element) return;

src/services/exportService.ts:      logging: false,
src/services/exportService.ts:    });

src/services/exportService.ts:    
src/services/exportService.ts:    // Strip the data URL prefix to get just the base64 string
src/services/exportService.ts:    const base64Image = imgData.split(',')[1];
src/services/exportService.ts:    
src/services/exportService.ts:    const imgProps = pdf.getImageProperties(imgData);
src/services/exportService.ts:    const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();

src/services/exportService.ts:    
src/services/exportService.ts:    pdf.addImage(base64Image, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);

src/firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/firebase.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/firebase.ts:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/firebase.ts:    authInfo: {
src/firebase.ts:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/firebase.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/firebase.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/firebase.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/firebase.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/firebase.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
src/firebase.ts:        providerId: provider.providerId,
src/firebase.ts:        displayName: provider.displayName,
src/firebase.ts:        email: provider.email,
src/firebase.ts:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/firebase.ts:      })) || []
src/firebase.ts:    },
src/firebase.ts:    operationType,
src/firebase.ts:    path
src/firebase.ts:  }
src/firebase.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/firebase.ts:}

src/lib/imageUtils.ts:
src/lib/imageUtils.ts:  const options = {
src/lib/imageUtils.ts:    maxSizeMB: 1, // Max size 1MB
src/lib/imageUtils.ts:    maxWidthOrHeight: 1920, // Max dimension 1920px

src/lib/imageUtils.ts:  };
src/lib/imageUtils.ts:

src/lib/imageUtils.ts:    return new File([compressedFile], file.name, {

README.md:# منصة الإبداع للمجال الأول
README.md:
README.md:منصة تعليمية متكاملة مخصصة لمعلمات المجال الأول، تهدف إلى تسهيل التواصل، تبادل الخبرات، وإدارة الموارد التعليمية والمشاريع المدرسية.
README.md:
README.md:## المميزات الرئيسية
README.md:
README.md:*   **لوحة تحكم المشرفة:** إدارة المعلمات، المشاريع، التعميمات، والأرشفة السنوية.
README.md:*   **لوحة تحكم المعلمة:** رفع الدروس، المشاركة في المشاريع، والتواصل مع المشرفة.
README.md:*   **نظام المحادثة الفوري:** تواصل مباشر بين المشرفة والمعلمات عبر WebSockets.
README.md:*   **إدارة الدروس والموارد:** رفع الملفات (PDF, Word, PowerPoint) والتعليق عليها.
README.md:*   **إدارة المشاريع:** متابعة تنفيذ المشاريع المدرسية ورفع المخرجات.
README.md:*   **الأرشفة الإلكترونية:** نظام أرشفة تلقائي للسنوات الدراسية السابقة.
README.md:
README.md:## التقنيات المستخدمة
README.md:
README.md:*   **Frontend:** React 19, Tailwind CSS, Motion (Framer Motion), Lucide Icons.
README.md:*   **Backend:** Node.js, Express.
README.md:*   **Real-time:** Socket.io.
README.md:*   **Build Tool:** Vite.
README.md:*   **Language:** TypeScript.
README.md:
README.md:## بيانات الدخول الافتراضية
README.md:
README.md:*   **المشرفة الرئيسية:**
README.md:    *   الرقم الوظيفي: `16115506`
README.md:    *   كلمة المرور: `16115506`
README.md:*   **المشرفة العامة:**
README.md:    *   الرقم الوظيفي: `admin`
README.md:    *   كلمة المرور: `admin`
README.md:
README.md:## التشغيل محلياً
README.md:
README.md:1.  قم بتثبيت التبعيات:
README.md:    ```bash
README.md:    npm install
README.md:    ```
README.md:
README.md:2.  قم بتشغيل خادم التطوير:
README.md:    ```bash
README.md:    npm run dev
README.md:    ```
README.md:
README.md:3.  افتح المتصفح على الرابط: `http://localhost:3000`
README.md:
README.md:## البناء للإنتاج
README.md:
README.md:```bash
README.md:npm run build
README.md:```
README.md:
README.md:## الترخيص
README.md:
README.md:هذا المشروع مرخص تحت رخصة MIT.

server.ts:import express from "express";
server.ts:import { createServer } from "http";
server.ts:import { Server } from "socket.io";
server.ts:import { createServer as createViteServer } from "vite";
server.ts:import path from "path";
server.ts:import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
server.ts:
server.ts:const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
server.ts:const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
server.ts:
server.ts:async function startServer() {
server.ts:  const app = express();
server.ts:  const httpServer = createServer(app);
server.ts:  const io = new Server(httpServer, {
server.ts:    maxHttpBufferSize: 1e8, // 100 MB
server.ts:    cors: {
server.ts:      origin: "*",
server.ts:      methods: ["GET", "POST"]
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  const PORT = 3000;
server.ts:
server.ts:  // In-memory message store (for demo purposes - in real app use DB)
server.ts:  let messages: any[] = [];
server.ts:
server.ts:  io.on("connection", (socket) => {
server.ts:    console.log("User connected:", socket.id);
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Send existing messages to the newly connected user
server.ts:    socket.emit("initial_messages", messages);
server.ts:
server.ts:    socket.on("send_message", (message) => {
server.ts:      const newMessage = {
server.ts:        ...message,
server.ts:        id: Date.now().toString(),
server.ts:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:        isRead: false
server.ts:      };
server.ts:      messages.push(newMessage);
server.ts:      // Broadcast to everyone
server.ts:      io.emit("new_message", newMessage);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    socket.on("mark_as_read", (messageId) => {
server.ts:      messages = messages.map(m => m.id === messageId ? { ...m, isRead: true } : m);
server.ts:      io.emit("message_updated", messageId);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    socket.on("send_notification", (notification) => {
server.ts:      // Broadcast notification to all clients
server.ts:      // The client-side logic will filter by userId to show only relevant notifications
server.ts:      io.emit("new_notification", notification);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    socket.on("disconnect", () => {
server.ts:      console.log("User disconnected:", socket.id);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // API routes
server.ts:  app.get("/api/health", (req, res) => {
server.ts:    res.json({ status: "ok" });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Vite middleware for development
server.ts:  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
server.ts:    const vite = await createViteServer({
server.ts:      server: { middlewareMode: true },
server.ts:      appType: "spa",
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    app.use(vite.middlewares);
server.ts:  } else {
server.ts:    app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "dist")));
server.ts:    app.get("*", (req, res) => {
server.ts:      res.sendFile(path.join(__dirname, "dist", "index.html"));
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  httpServer.listen(PORT, "0.0.0.0", () => {
server.ts:    console.log(`Server running on http://0.0.0.0:${PORT}`);
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:startServer();

types.ts:}

services/geminiService.ts:export const chatWithAI = async (message: string, history: {role: 'user' | 'ai', content: string}[]): Promise<string> => {
services/geminiService.ts:  try {
services/geminiService.ts:    const chat = ai.chats.create({
services/geminiService.ts:      model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
services/geminiService.ts:      config: {
services/geminiService.ts:        systemInstruction: "أنت مساعد ذكي وخبير تربوي لمعلمات المجال الأول في سلطنة عمان. تجيب باللغة العربية بأسلوب احترافي وداعم، وتقدم أفكاراً إبداعية للتدريس والأنشطة الصفية.",
services/geminiService.ts:      },
services/geminiService.ts:    });
services/geminiService.ts:
services/geminiService.ts:    // We need to send the history if possible, but the SDK's chat.sendMessage only takes the latest message.
services/geminiService.ts:    // To maintain context, we can prepend the history to the message or use the chat instance if we kept it around.
services/geminiService.ts:    // Since we create a new chat instance here, we'll just send the latest message with some context.
services/geminiService.ts:    
services/geminiService.ts:    let contextMessage = message;
services/geminiService.ts:    if (history.length > 0) {
services/geminiService.ts:      const historyText = history.map(h => `${h.role === 'user' ? 'المعلمة' : 'المساعد'}: ${h.content}`).join('\n');
services/geminiService.ts:      contextMessage = `المحادثة السابقة:\n${historyText}\n\nسؤال المعلمة الحالي: ${message}`;
services/geminiService.ts:    }
services/geminiService.ts:
services/geminiService.ts:    const response = await chat.sendMessage({ message: contextMessage });
services/geminiService.ts:    return response.text || "عذراً، لم أتمكن من الرد.";
services/geminiService.ts:  } catch (error) {
services/geminiService.ts:    console.error("Gemini Chat Error:", error);
services/geminiService.ts:    return "عذراً، حدث خطأ أثناء الاتصال بالمساعد الذكي. يرجى المحاولة مرة أخرى.";
services/geminiService.ts:  }

App.tsx:            const snap = await getDocs(q);
App.tsx:            
App.tsx:            if (!snap.empty) {
App.tsx:              userData = { ...snap.docs[0].data() as User, id: snap.docs[0].id };
App.tsx:            } else {
App.tsx:              // 2. محاولة البحث بالمعرف (ID) إذا كان البريد الإلكتروني يتبع النمط ID@moe.om أو ID@app.com

App.tsx:                if (userDoc.exists()) {
App.tsx:                  userData = { ...userDoc.data() as User, id: userDoc.id };
App.tsx:                }
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            if (userData) {

App.tsx:                setAuth({ user: userData, isAuthenticated: true });
App.tsx:              } else {

App.tsx:              }

App.tsx:              setAuth({ user: null, isAuthenticated: false });

App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          } catch (error) {
App.tsx:            console.error("Error fetching user data:", error);
App.tsx:            setAuth({ user: null, isAuthenticated: false });
App.tsx:            await signOut(firebaseAuth);
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      } else {
App.tsx:        setAuth({ user: null, isAuthenticated: false });
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:      setIsAuthReady(true);
App.tsx:    });
App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();

App.tsx:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
App.tsx:        isRead: false

App.tsx:        const cleanMessage = { ...messageData } as any;

App.tsx:          if (cleanMessage[key] === undefined) delete cleanMessage[key];
App.tsx:        });
App.tsx:        await setDoc(doc(db, 'messages', messageData.id), cleanMessage);
App.tsx:      } catch (error) {
App.tsx:        handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `messages/${messageData.id}`);
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:    }

App.tsx:  const handleLogin = async (user: User) => {
App.tsx:    if (user.code === '16115506' && user.password === 'admin') {
App.tsx:      try {
App.tsx:        const email = `16115506@moe.om`;
App.tsx:        const firebasePassword = `admin`; // Using the requested password
App.tsx:        try {
App.tsx:          await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:        } catch (signInError: any) {
App.tsx:          if (signInError.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || signInError.code === 'auth/invalid-credential') {
App.tsx:            try {
App.tsx:              await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:            } catch (createError: any) {
App.tsx:              if (createError.code === 'auth/email-already-in-use') {
App.tsx:                // If email already in use, try to sign in one more time with the fixed password
App.tsx:                try {
App.tsx:                  await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:                } catch (retrySignInError) {
App.tsx:                  const fallbackEmail = `16115506@app.com`;
App.tsx:                  try {
App.tsx:                    await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, fallbackEmail, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:                  } catch (fallbackSignInError2: any) {
App.tsx:                    if (fallbackSignInError2.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || fallbackSignInError2.code === 'auth/invalid-credential') {
App.tsx:                      try {
App.tsx:                        await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, fallbackEmail, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:                      } catch (fallbackCreateError) {
App.tsx:                        throw fallbackCreateError;
App.tsx:                      }
App.tsx:                    } else {
App.tsx:                      throw fallbackSignInError2;
App.tsx:                    }
App.tsx:                  }
App.tsx:                }
App.tsx:              } else {
App.tsx:                throw createError;
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          } else if (signInError.code === 'auth/operation-not-allowed') {
App.tsx:            alert("يرجى تفعيل المصادقة بكلمة المرور والبريد الإلكتروني (Email/Password Authentication) من لوحة تحكم Firebase.");
App.tsx:            return;
App.tsx:          } else {
App.tsx:            throw signInError;
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      } catch (error: any) {
App.tsx:        console.error("Failed to sign in admin for setup:", error);
App.tsx:        if (error.code === 'auth/operation-not-allowed') {
App.tsx:          alert("يرجى تفعيل المصادقة بكلمة المرور والبريد الإلكتروني (Email/Password Authentication) من لوحة تحكم Firebase.");
App.tsx:        } else {
App.tsx:          alert("فشل تسجيل دخول المشرفة. يرجى التأكد من إعدادات Firebase.");
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:        return;
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:      setIsPasswordChangeRequired(true);
App.tsx:      return;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:    if (!user.isActive) {
App.tsx:      alert('عذراً، هذا الحساب غير نشط.');
App.tsx:      return;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // Ensure Firebase Auth session for custom login
App.tsx:    try {
App.tsx:      const email = `${user.id}@moe.om`;
App.tsx:      const firebasePassword = `SecurePass_${user.id}_2026!`; // Use a strong fixed password for Firebase Auth
App.tsx:      try {
App.tsx:        await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:      } catch (signInError: any) {
App.tsx:        if (signInError.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || signInError.code === 'auth/invalid-credential') {
App.tsx:          // Try with the user's actual password in case it was created with that previously
App.tsx:          try {
App.tsx:            await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, user.password);
App.tsx:            // If successful, we should probably update it to the fixed password, but we need to be signed in to do that.
App.tsx:            // Since we are now signed in, we can update it.
App.tsx:            const currentUser = firebaseAuth.currentUser;
App.tsx:            if (currentUser) {
App.tsx:              const { updatePassword } = await import('firebase/auth');
App.tsx:              await updatePassword(currentUser, firebasePassword).catch(console.error);
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          } catch (fallbackSignInError: any) {
App.tsx:            // If both fail, try to create
App.tsx:            try {
App.tsx:              await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:              if (user.role === UserRole.SUPERVISOR || user.role === UserRole.TEMP_SUPERVISOR) {
App.tsx:                try {
App.tsx:                  await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', user.id), user);
App.tsx:                } catch (docError) {
App.tsx:                  console.error("Failed to create supervisor doc:", docError);
App.tsx:                }
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            } catch (createError: any) {
App.tsx:              if (createError.code === 'auth/email-already-in-use') {
App.tsx:                // If email already in use, try to sign in one more time with the fixed password
App.tsx:                try {
App.tsx:                  await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, email, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:                } catch (retrySignInError) {
App.tsx:                  // Fallback to @app.com if the @moe.om account is completely out of sync
App.tsx:                  const fallbackEmail = `${user.id}@app.com`;
App.tsx:                  try {
App.tsx:                    await signInWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, fallbackEmail, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:                  } catch (fallbackSignInError2: any) {
App.tsx:                    if (fallbackSignInError2.code === 'auth/user-not-found' || fallbackSignInError2.code === 'auth/invalid-credential') {
App.tsx:                      try {
App.tsx:                        await createUserWithEmailAndPassword(firebaseAuth, fallbackEmail, firebasePassword);
App.tsx:                      } catch (fallbackCreateError) {
App.tsx:                        console.error("Fallback create failed:", fallbackCreateError);
App.tsx:                        alert("تعذر تسجيل الدخول للمصادقة. يرجى التواصل مع الدعم الفني لإعادة تعيين حسابك.");
App.tsx:                        return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:                      }
App.tsx:                    } else {
App.tsx:                      console.error("Fallback sign in failed:", fallbackSignInError2);
App.tsx:                      alert("تعذر تسجيل الدخول للمصادقة. يرجى التواصل مع الدعم الفني لإعادة تعيين حسابك.");
App.tsx:                      return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:                    }
App.tsx:                  }
App.tsx:                }
App.tsx:              } else if (createError.code === 'auth/too-many-requests') {
App.tsx:                console.warn("Too many requests, please wait.");
App.tsx:                return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:              } else if (createError.code === 'auth/operation-not-allowed') {
App.tsx:                alert("يرجى تفعيل المصادقة بكلمة المرور والبريد الإلكتروني (Email/Password Authentication) من لوحة تحكم Firebase.");
App.tsx:                return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:              } else {
App.tsx:                alert("فشل إنشاء حساب المصادقة. قد لا تعمل بعض الميزات بشكل صحيح.");
App.tsx:                return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        } else if (signInError.code === 'auth/too-many-requests') {
App.tsx:          console.warn("Too many requests, please wait.");
App.tsx:          return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:        } else if (signInError.code === 'auth/operation-not-allowed') {
App.tsx:          alert("يرجى تفعيل المصادقة بكلمة المرور والبريد الإلكتروني (Email/Password Authentication) من لوحة تحكم Firebase.");
App.tsx:          return; // Stop login process
App.tsx:        } else {
App.tsx:          console.error("Sign in failed:", signInError);
App.tsx:          alert("فشل تسجيل الدخول للمصادقة. قد لا تعمل بعض الميزات بشكل صحيح.");

App.tsx:        onUpdateTeacher={async (originalId, updatedTeacher) => {
App.tsx:          try {
App.tsx:            const cleanTeacher = { ...updatedTeacher } as any;
App.tsx:            Object.keys(cleanTeacher).forEach(key => {
App.tsx:              if (cleanTeacher[key] === undefined) {
App.tsx:                delete cleanTeacher[key];
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            });
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            if (originalId !== updatedTeacher.id) {
App.tsx:              if (teachers.some(t => t.id === updatedTeacher.id)) {
App.tsx:                alert('عذراً، الرقم الوظيفي الجديد مسجل مسبقاً لمستخدم آخر');
App.tsx:                return;
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:              // Create new doc with new ID
App.tsx:              await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', updatedTeacher.id), cleanTeacher);
App.tsx:              // Delete old doc
App.tsx:              await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'users', originalId));
App.tsx:
App.tsx:              // Update lessonMaterials
App.tsx:              const lessonsToUpdate = lessonMaterials.filter(m => m.teacherId === originalId);
App.tsx:              for (const lesson of lessonsToUpdate) {
App.tsx:                await updateDoc(doc(db, 'lessonMaterials', lesson.id), { 
App.tsx:                  teacherId: updatedTeacher.id, 
App.tsx:                  teacherName: updatedTeacher.name 
App.tsx:                });
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:              // Update projects
App.tsx:              const projectsToUpdate = projects.filter(p => p.assignedTeacherIds.includes(originalId));
App.tsx:              for (const project of projectsToUpdate) {
App.tsx:                const updatedIds = project.assignedTeacherIds.map(id => id === originalId ? updatedTeacher.id : id);
App.tsx:                await updateDoc(doc(db, 'projects', project.id), { assignedTeacherIds: updatedIds });
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            } else {
App.tsx:              await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', originalId), cleanTeacher);
App.tsx:              // Update name in lessons if changed
App.tsx:              const oldTeacher = teachers.find(t => t.id === originalId);
App.tsx:              if (oldTeacher && oldTeacher.name !== updatedTeacher.name) {
App.tsx:                const lessonsToUpdate = lessonMaterials.filter(m => m.teacherId === originalId);
App.tsx:                for (const lesson of lessonsToUpdate) {
App.tsx:                  await updateDoc(doc(db, 'lessonMaterials', lesson.id), { teacherName: updatedTeacher.name });
App.tsx:                }
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:            if (auth.user?.id === originalId) {
App.tsx:              setAuth(prev => ({ ...prev, user: cleanTeacher as User }));
App.tsx:            }
App.tsx:          } catch (error) {
App.tsx:            handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.UPDATE, `users/${originalId}`);
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:        }}

App.tsx:        onAddProject={async (p) => {
App.tsx:          try {
App.tsx:            const cleanProject = { ...p } as any;

App.tsx:              if (cleanProject[key] === undefined) delete cleanProject[key];
App.tsx:            });
App.tsx:            await setDoc(doc(db, 'projects', p.id), cleanProject);
App.tsx:          } catch (error) {
App.tsx:            handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `projects/${p.id}`);

App.tsx:        onUpdateProjectSubmission={async (pid, sub) => {

App.tsx:            if (project) {

App.tsx:                [`submissions.${sub.teacherId}`]: sub
App.tsx:              });
